page_info: The page shows the Juxtastat game interface on Urban Stats. It presents a question: 'Which has a higher % of people who are renters?' with two choices: 'CA-45 (2023), USA' and 'MI-02 (2023), USA'. There is a progress indicator below the maps with five slots; two slots are filled (one red, one green), indicating that two questions have been answered and three remain.
thoughts: The user is currently in the middle of the daily Juxtastat game. They have completed 2 out of 5 questions. Since the game is still active and has not reached the results or completion screen, the goal to have 'played or completed' the daily game is not yet fully met.
